data.name: ticket.title_invalid
data.value: The title is required and must be at least 3 characters long.

data.name: ticket.title_too_long
data.value: The title must not exceed 255 characters.

data.name: ticket.priority_invalid
data.value: Invalid priority. Allowed values: low, medium, high, urgent.

data.name: ticket.source_invalid
data.value: Invalid source. Allowed values: web, email, api.

data.name: ticket.quota_exceeded
data.value: Monthly ticket limit reached for the current plan.

data.name: ticket.assignee_invalid
data.value: The assignee must be a member of this company.

data.name: ticket.sort_invalid
data.value: Invalid sort. Allowed values: created_at, priority, status.

data.name: ticket.status_invalid
data.value: Invalid status. Allowed values: open, in_progress, pending, resolved, closed.

data.name: ticket.invalid_transition
data.value: This status transition is not allowed from the current status.

data.name: ticket.forbidden
data.value: You are not allowed to create a ticket in this company.
